name: 04 Video Transcript Ingest
description: Runnable transcript adapter: submit a media URL to VideoTranscriptAPI, poll task completion over HTTP nodes, normalize transcript chunks, and return a NormalizedTextObject-compatible ingress input. VideoTranscriptAPI summary/cache/LLM outputs are treated only as upstream context via upstream_summary or transcript_service_meta. This workflow does not run scoring, dedupe, action policy, or Vault writing.
